payload.description:
Feature: Scorecard History report

As a lab report user, I want a scorecard history report for starred score-version changes, so that I can explain what changed over a time period and whether those changes reached champion.

Scenario: Scorecard-wide history shows only changed scores
Given a scorecard has multiple scores
And some scores have featured versions created in the requested window
When I run the Scorecard History report without a score parameter
Then the report includes only scores with featured versions created in the window.

Scenario: Single-score history limits scope
Given a scorecard has a selected score
When I run the Scorecard History report with a score parameter
Then the report includes featured versions created in the window only for that score.

Scenario: Champion coverage is summarized
Given included featured versions have champion status for all, none, or some versions
When the report summary is generated
Then it states whether all, none, or some included changes were promoted to champion.

Scenario: Diffs are available on demand
Given an included version has a parent version
When I expand the version and then expand code or guidelines diff
Then I see the original and modified content in a Monaco diff view.
payload.title: Scorecard history report summarizes starred score-version changes
